title: Gera Developments is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Gera Developments is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Gera Developments, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Gera Developments:
Gera Developments is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gera Developments!
